things.name: Parque Fundidora
things.description: Vast urban park in a converted 19th-century steel foundry with museums, gardens and a skating rink

things.name: Cerro de la Silla
things.description: Iconic saddle-shaped mountain, symbol of Monterrey — hike to the summit for panoramic views

things.name: Macroplaza & Faro del Comercio
things.description: One of the world's largest public squares with the laser-projecting Faro del Comercio tower

things.name: Grutas de Garcia
things.description: Ancient cave system in the Sierra Madre with impressive stalactites, reached by cable car

things.name: Museo de Arte Contemporaneo (MARCO)
things.description: Contemporary art museum with a bronze dove sculpture by Juan Soriano at its entrance

things.name: Barrio Antiguo
things.description: Historic neighbourhood with colonial architecture, galleries and the liveliest nightlife in the city

things.name: Cascada Cola de Caballo
things.description: Stunning 35-metre Horsetail Falls in the El Cielo biosphere reserve south of the city

things.name: Museo del Noreste (MUNE)
things.description: Excellent history museum inside Parque Fundidora covering northeast Mexico across five centuries

things.name: Mercado Juarez
things.description: Traditional market with regional Norteño food, handcrafts and the famous Mexican burritos

things.name: Presa Rodrigo Gomez (La Boca)
things.description: Scenic reservoir in the mountains ideal for kayaking, zip-lining and waterside dining
